zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Sothill於1505年5月21日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾斯托可斯東時，她的父親Henry Sothill34歲，母親Joan Empson40歲。她於大約1520年與Sir William Drury在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1575年5月19日在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍斯亞德享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Sothill于1505年5月21日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾斯托可斯東时，她的父亲Henry Sothill34岁，母亲Joan Empson40岁。她于大约1520年与Sir William Drury在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1575年5月19日在英国英格兰素福爾可霍斯亞德享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: Sothill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Soothill (in Dewsbury, WR Yorks).

variants.name: Suttle
meanings: nickname from Middle English sotil, sutel ‘subtle, clever, cunning’ (Old French sotil).
habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Southwell
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Sothill was born on 21 May 1505, in Stockerston, Leicestershire, England, her father, Henry Sothill, was 34 and her mother, Joan Empson, was 40. She married Sir William Drury about 1520, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 19 May 1575, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Sothill est née le 21 mai 1505, à Stockerston, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Sothill, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan Empson, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Drury environ 1520, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 mai 1575, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1520 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Sir William Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Sothill è nata il il 21 maggio 1505 nel Stockerston, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Henry Sothill, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joan Empson, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Drury circa 1520, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 19 maggio 1575, nel Hawstead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sothillが1505年5月21日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアストッカーストンで生まれた時，父Henry Sothillは34歳，母Joan Empsonは40歳であった。約1520年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでSir William Druryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1575年5月19日にイギリスイギリススフォルクハウステアドで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Churchyard Hawstead, St. Edmu: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sothill(이)가 1505년 5월 21일 영국 레이스스터실르 스톡르스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Sothill(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Empson(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Sir William Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 5월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 호스테아드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.All Saints Churchyard Hawstead, St. Edmu: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Sothill nasceu em 21 de maio de 1505, em Stockerston, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Sothill, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan Empson, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Drury aproximadamente 1520, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de maio de 1575, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints Churchyard Hawstead, St. Edmu: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Sothill родилась 21 мая 1505 г. в местности стоккирстон, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Sothill было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Empson, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Drury около 1520 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 19 мая 1575 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir William Drury aproximadamente 1520, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas.
